title: The launch configuration must be supervised: no autonomous send before the calibration gate (`EXP-001`) and an approved decision (`ADR-0004`).

title: All processing must comply with the company PII and data-retention policy; PII handling is dictated by security, not by this project (`ASM-003`).

title: The agent must reach the model provider only through a vendor-neutral abstraction; no provider-specific SDK calls in application code (`ASM-004`).

title: Per-email cost must stay within the operating budget; a run that would exceed the cap is aborted, not completed (`NFR-004`, `INV-005`).

title: The category/urgency taxonomy and the auto-send whitelist are owned by Support Ops (`STK-004`); the agent must use them as given and not invent categories.
